name: fable-mode
description: A documentation-only Codex plugin that adds a reusable skill for careful planning, disciplined tool use, verification-first coding, and concise reporting.

interface.shortDescription: Use a careful, verification-first Codex workflow
interface.longDescription: Fable Mode is an unofficial, original, provider-neutral Codex skill for deliberate task framing, disciplined tool use, explicit assumptions, verification-first implementation, and concise final reporting. It is documentation-only and adds no tools, servers, hooks, network calls, or telemetry.
defaultPrompt: Use $fable-mode to frame the task, inspect context, plan risky changes, verify assumptions, run relevant checks, and report changes, tests, risks, and assumptions.
